expected_outcome: One authoritative release issues one offer.
Micro-batch assigns distinct units without rescanning the full waitlist.
Stable pair ordering falls back to deterministic priority key ordering.
Policy may expand nonexclusive choice only when audited and still bounded by one visible offer per entry.
Entry is eligible by keys but batch must assign nothing because deadline truth has already moved to fallback_required.
Only one active decision-required offer may stay open for the entry even when more released capacity arrives in the same horizon.
